title: stanhopea × thienii
intro: Stanhopea × thienii, also known as the Thien's Stanhopea, is a hybrid orchid species belonging to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stanhopea × thienii are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as a boost to the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas to harness its medicinal properties.
